APT Flour Mills

Stone Ground · Naturally Pure · Traditionally Milled

Explore Our Products
25+ Years of Trust
Who We Are

Milling Excellence Since 1999

APT Flour Mills has been a trusted name in premium flour production for over two decades. We use time-honoured stone-grinding techniques to preserve the natural nutrients, bran, and germ in every grain.

Our state-of-the-art facility in Coimbatore processes wheat, millets, and pulses sourced directly from farmers — ensuring freshness, quality, and a direct connection from farm to your kitchen.

25+Years Experience
40+Product Varieties
5000+Happy Customers
What We Offer

Our Product Range

All our flours are freshly milled without preservatives, bleaching agents, or additives — just pure, wholesome goodness.

Pease Flour

Stone-ground from premium green peas. High in plant protein and fibre — ideal for soups, flatbreads, and healthy baking.

High Protein

Murukku Flour

Specially blended flour for crispy, perfect murukku every time. Light, smooth texture ensures consistent crunch and authentic taste.

Crispy Snacks

Ragi (Finger Millet) Flour

Naturally gluten-free and calcium-rich. Our cold-milled ragi flour retains full nutritional value — perfect for health-conscious families.

Gluten Free

Rice Flour (Idiyappam Grade)

Finely ground from select raw rice varieties. Ideal for idiyappam, kozhukattai, and other traditional South Indian dishes.

Traditional

Besan (Chickpea Flour)

Cold-milled from premium Bengal gram. Smooth, nutty, and aromatic — essential for pakoras, sweets, and savoury snacks.

High Protein

Multigrain Flour Blend

A nutritionist-approved blend of wheat, oats, soy, ragi, and bajra. Power-packed for daily rotis with extra health benefits.

Health Blend
Why Choose Us

Our Promise to You

🌾

Farm-Direct Sourcing

We partner directly with farmers across Tamil Nadu and Rajasthan to source the finest grains at peak quality.

🪨

Stone-Ground Milling

Traditional chakki grinding preserves nutrients, aroma, and natural fibre lost in roller mills.

✅

No Additives

Zero preservatives, bleaching agents, or artificial enhancers. Pure flour, exactly as nature intended.

🚚

Fresh Daily Dispatch

Milled and packed fresh every day. Orders dispatched within 24 hours to ensure maximum freshness.
